start: Good day, sir. I am at your service.
Welcome back, sir. Shall we commence?
I trust you are well, sir.
acknowledge: If I may, sir, right away.
done: Done, sir. I trust it is to your satisfaction.
Finished, sir. Shall I fetch anything further?
Your request has been attended to.
error: Terribly sorry, sir. An unfortunate complication.
My sincere apologies, sir. The matter requires another attempt.
Regrettably, sir, something has gone amiss.
Dreadful, sir. Shall we try again?
waiting: Still here, sir. At your leisure.
